heading: UNITED STATES NAVAL OBSERVATORY
label: 867 UNITED STATES NAVAL OBSERVATORY
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 867, consisting of sections 8911 to 8929, related to retirement from the Air Force for length of service, prior to renumbering as chapter 941 of this title.
